content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street ♦ Suite 620 ♦ Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 ♦ Fax (916) 322-0886


March 12, 2004


Lynn Daucher
990 West Birchcrest Avenue
Brea, CA 92821

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-04-056

Dear Ms. Daucher:

Pursuant to your request, your request for advice dated February 26, 2004, and received by this office on March 1, 2004, is withdrawn.

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: C. Scott Tocher
Counsel, Legal Division


CST:jg
I:\AdviceLtrs\04-056

embedding.qa_text: This is a formal letter from the Fair Political Practices Commission (FPPC) in response to a request for advice. The letter is dated March 12, 2004, and is addressed to Lynn Daucher at her home address in Brea, CA. The FPPC informs Ms. Daucher that her request for advice dated February 26, 2004, has been withdrawn. If she has any other questions regarding this matter, she should contact the Commission at (916) 322-5660. The letter is signed by Luisa Menchaca, General Counsel, and C. Scott Tocher, Counsel, Legal Division. The file number W-04-056 is referenced in the subject line of the letter.

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660. Sincerely, Luisa Menchaca General Counsel By: C.
